title: Add score-10 easter egg milestone overlay
constraints: Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
This easter egg must be one-shot (fires only once per game session, not every time score 10 is reached).
Match the exact street-art overlay style used by the score-5 and score-15 easter eggs in useGameState.ts and GameUI.tsx.
nonGoals: Changing any other game mechanics or scoring logic.
Modifying the score-5 or score-15 easter eggs.
